name: my-harness-generator
description: Generic project harness generator. /my-harness-init walks you through a structured interview, produces spec markdowns, and bootstraps the project end-to-end. Supports Hono + Cloudflare D1 + Resend + Playwright + Maestro, with 4-lane parallel development, TDD enforcement, Codex integration, secret masking, and git discipline.

plugins.name: my-harness
plugins.description: Harness generator core. 21 skills (entry point + conventions + shell wrappers + /harness-team-lead Agent Teams orchestrator) + 4 worker agent definitions (harness-analyst / harness-engineer / harness-e2e-reviewer / harness-reviewer, each instantiated 4× to form a 16-teammate Agent Teams team: 4 lanes × 4 roles) + 2 hooks (auto-logged conversations). Requires CLAUDE_CODE_EXPERIMENTAL_AGENT_TEAMS=1.
